overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza in Night City during dusk. The player moves from a covered walkway with large corporate billboards through an open plaza with food stalls and holographic advertisements, ending at an overlook with benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with corporate advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered walkway beneath large illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the ground near a concrete structure

entered.detail: large illuminated purple and orange corporate advertisements mounted on the wall
sloped concrete ramp with red and white painted edges leading upward
gray concrete wall with faint graffiti markings behind the billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered urban walkway dominated by large Militech Coffee billboards. The player walks forward on wet concrete pavement, passing seated NPCs on the right. The environment is enclosed with limited sky visibility, illuminated by artificial neon lighting from the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza under elevated transit bridge

events.description: exits covered walkway into more open plaza area with visible sky
passes underneath large overhead transit bridge structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while looking up at the towering architecture and overhead bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the plaza

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated bridge spanning across the street with green neon signage
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
tall futuristic glass and steel building rising in the distance
large illuminated billboard displaying a helmeted figure with text SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the player exits the covered walkway, revealing a towering transit bridge overhead and futuristic skyscrapers ahead. Palm trees line the right side while the iconic Security You Can Trust hologram becomes visible. The ground transitions to tiled pavement as more pedestrians appear.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with circular advertisement kiosk

events.description: approaching and circling around the large yellow advertisement structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd while crossing the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: large circular yellow structure covered in holographic advertisements and product displays
small vendor stalls with illuminated signs and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a bustling open plaza dominated by a large yellow circular advertisement kiosk covered in holographic displays. The Security You Can Trust billboard looms large on the right while crowds of pedestrians move through the space. The environment is brightly lit with neon advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with food vendors and outdoor dining

events.description: entering narrower walkway with food stalls and outdoor seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and outdoor seating areas, observing the street life

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart with colorful umbrella

entered.detail: small blue food cart with red and blue striped umbrella and illuminated menu
red plastic chairs and tables arranged outside food stalls
narrow strip of artificial grass with embedded blue neon lighting
green canopy structure with neon lighting covering outdoor seating

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrower pedestrian walkway lined with food vendors. A colorful food cart with an umbrella stands on the left while outdoor dining tables with red chairs occupy the right. A neon-lit grass strip runs down the center of the path, and the area feels more intimate than the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza overlook with seating and city views

events.description: approaching bench seating area with trash and debris visible on ground

agents.ego_description: walking through a quieter plaza area with people relaxing on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting alone on a concrete bench

entered.detail: concrete and metal benches arranged in the plaza for seating
metal railing overlooking the lower city levels with view of distant buildings
large red fabric banner hanging from a food stall structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a quieter plaza area with park benches and palm tree planters. Fewer pedestrians are present, with some sitting and relaxing. The Security You Can Trust billboard is visible in the distance across the plaza, and the area has a more relaxed atmosphere compared to the busy commercial zones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined corporate walkway into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins under a covered passage dominated by large Militech Coffee billboards, moving across wet concrete past seated pedestrians in an enclosed space of artificial light. As the camera exits the walkway, the environment opens up to reveal a towering transit bridge and futuristic skyscrapers, with the ground transitioning to tiled pavement lined by palm trees. The scene then expands into a bustling open plaza where a large yellow circular kiosk and a massive Security You Can Trust hologram loom over the crowds. Finally, the movement culminates in the heart of the plaza, where bright holographic advertisements reflect vividly off the damp ground.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, intimate pedestrian corridor into a quiet, open urban plaza. It begins by moving through a narrow walkway lined with food vendors, passing a colorful cart with an umbrella on the left and outdoor dining tables with red chairs on the right. As the camera glides forward, it follows a neon-lit grass strip that centers the path, guiding the viewer away from the commercial density. The scene then opens into a more relaxed plaza area characterized by palm tree planters and park benches where a few pedestrians sit and relax. Finally, the view expands across the tranquil space toward a distant Security You Can Trust billboard under the dusk sky.
